summary: The code review flagged a likely null dereference and the architect raised a coupling concern; address the null guard first, then revisit the boundary between a.ts and b.ts.

comments.body: **[code-review]** Guard against undefined before using new2. **[architect]** Also consider decoupling a.ts from b.ts here.
**[code-review]** Hallucinated off-diff anchor that must be dropped on re-validation.
